sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43577" key="eu)gra/mmatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐγράμμᾰτος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n43577.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a good writer</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
